29 May 2017
Dear Students,
Examination Result Release, Supplementary Examination and Appeal against Course-based Assessment for the 2nd Semester of 2016/17
Please note the following announcements:
1. Release of Examination Results
The examination results for the 2nd Semester, 2016/17 will be released on 31 May 2017 (Wednesday) at 12:00 noon. You may check your course results on MyBU- Study (My Study > Course Enrollment).
The online academic report will be available on MyBU-Study (My Study > Graduation > Print Academic Report) from 7 June 2017 (Wednesday) at 12:00 noon.
However, students who have not yet successfully completed the Library Workshop and Academic Integrity On-line Tutorial will be blocked from viewing the examination results and the online academic report.
2. Supplementary Examination
Students who are allowed to take supplementary examination will receive the notification via MyBU-Study and email on or after 31 May 2017. Students should watch out for the important announcements made by the College. Details about supplementary examination can be found from the Student Handbook.
3. Application for Course-based Assessment
Students who request to appeal against course-based assessment including examination grades, should submit the completed application form to the Academic Registry Services Section on 2/F, Franki Centre, Kowloon Tong or 13/F, Shek Mun Campus in person no later than 7 June 2017 (Wednesday) at 5:30 pm.
The application form is available for downloading from MyBU-Study (My Study > Forms and Policy). Please refer to the Student Handbook for more information on the application.
For enquiries, please contact us at 3411 3366 (Kowloon Tong Campus) or 3411 3022 (Shek Mun Campus).
